shop.label: Boutique
shop.title: Shop
shop.description: Studio products and curated items from Casper Tattoo Kaohsiung. Add to cart and check out — we will contact you to confirm payment and pickup or shipping.
shop.noProducts: New items coming soon. Check back or reach us on Instagram.
shop.totalPending: Subtotal will be confirmed — some items may need a custom quote.
shop.checkoutBlurb: Enter your details to place the order. No online payment yet — we will email you (if configured) and follow up to arrange payment.
shop.checkoutBankTransferIntro: Transfer the order total to our account below, then enter the last 5 digits of the bank account you sent the payment from (sending account) so we can match your transfer.
shop.checkoutTransferLastFive: Last 5 digits of your transferring account
shop.orderSuccessBody: We received your order and will be in touch shortly.
shop.cartStale: Some cart lines are out of date (for example, a size changed). Clear the cart or remove old items and try again.
